_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #123: route U2 building buys through safeBuyBuilding with an explicit-amount path. The game crafts ONE queue entry per craft cycle and takes min(DecaBuild?10:DoubleBuild?2:1, that entry stack amount) from it, so U2 passing forceAmt=1 at every site made a queue of X.1 entries that built ONE per cycle — DecaBuild bought U2 players literally nothing. Queue depth is not throughput; stack size is. Housing/Smithy/Microchip/Laboratory now queue a bulkBuyAmount() stack, Tribute keeps its computed bulk count (the ladder would have capped the one site that already worked), and the Hypothermia bonfire Shed stays a forced single buy (its own predicate is a single-Shed doubling ladder). L0 baseline-zero stays green because no corpus save carries a Bone-Portal reward, so that green is NOT evidence the fix works — the evidence is hand-built in tests/buildings.u2Stacking.test.ts, mutation-checked (expected 1 to be 10).
